index.description: Gather inputs and make a single explicit decision. Output is a written decision with reasoning. Build vs buy, kill vs continue, A vs B technology choice, scope-in / scope-out, hire vs not, vendor evaluation gates.

playbook.summary: "Done = one ADR (status proposed) committed to repo: context, options considered with trade-off matrix, decision, consequences, links to spec / design / quality-attribute analysis; ready for async r..."
Capture one architecture decision so the client ARB accepts it, AI agents can replay it, and the next dev finds it in 18 months.
Run an ATAM-lite review of a proposed design with stakeholders, exiting with sensitivity points, risks, and trade-offs documented as ADRs.
New frontier or open-weight model dropped → decide within a day whether it enters cascade, replaces a tier, or is shelved.
Within an active canary window, the operator has a defensible decision (promote / hold / rollback) based on SLO burn, error-rate delta, and latency p99 against control, and the decision is logged.
One incoming CR ends with a written impact analysis covering scope, traceability deltas, risks, effort signal, and a clear go/no-go recommendation.

"Container vs serverless vs VM decision tree at architecture time. A reusable decision artifact + ADR template so the team stops re-litigating 'should this be Lambda or ECS or K8s' on each new service."
Qualified lead to 45-min discovery call yielding qualified-or-disqualified verdict + pain map + budget signal + proposal go/no-go.
Stuck on prompt iteration → clear go/no-go on fine-tuning with LoRA SFT/DPO data prep, training, eval, or documented stay on prompt+retrieval.

"Fine-tune vs prompt-engineer decision flow. Take an AI feature where prompt engineering plateaued and produce a defensible decision: keep iterating on prompts, do retrieval-augment, do LoRA / SFT,..."

"Structured decision and execution path: from baseline scorecard to a clear go/no-go on fine-tuning, including LoRA SFT/DPO data prep, training, eval, and deployment — or staying with prompt+retriev..."
"Discovery brief → two defensible quotes (fixed-price and T&M) with explicit AI-leverage adjustment + regulatory-uncertainty buffer; post-mortem can replay assumptions."

"Fixed-Price vs T&M Estimation with AI Risk Buffer — Given a discovery brief, produce two defensible quotes (fixed-price and T&M) with an explicit AI-leverage adjustment and a regulatory-uncertainty..."
"A 'spike' branch with a working prototype that proves OR disproves a candidate dependency. Decision doc in repo (ADR-style) with go / no-go and reasons. No production code committed unless go."

"End-to-end handling of a non-trivial CR mid-project (>15% scope or schedule impact, or breaking a signed baseline). End state — sponsor has costed, traced, validated options to decide; team has a r..."
Decide whether to extract a service from a modular monolith, with reversibility + bulkhead criteria, BEFORE writing the extraction PR.

A pull request touching Terraform, Helm, or GitHub Actions has a verdict (approve / request-changes) with concrete review notes covering blast radius, state safety, secret exposure, and rollback path.
One review meeting with mixed stakeholders ends with explicit approvals per requirement, parked items routed, and minutes published within an hour.
PM walks into a contested backlog and exits with a defensible, stakeholder-bought-in ordered list anchored to outcomes, not opinions.
Ad-hoc 20-45 minute working session that surfaces a problem before it turns red, lays out options, and exits with a stakeholder-owned decision plus a next step both sides can repeat.
Inbound request outside agreed scope. Done = either a written change order with new price/timeline, or a polite deferral to next sprint, with no silent absorption.
Inbound request outside agreed scope. Done = either a written change order with new price/timeline, or a polite deferral to next sprint, with no silent absorption.
Proposed new lib/SDK → lightweight ADR + SBOM diff + supply-chain scan + license check before merge.

"Engineer wants to add a new lib / SDK. Before merge: AI runs SBOM diff, supply-chain scan, license check; security-conscious engineer reviews the diff + alternatives. Decision recorded as a lightwe..."
Done = a new external surface (lib, integration, public endpoint) is reviewed for STRIDE-style threats, secret-handling, authn/z model, and supply-chain provenance; either ships with mitigations +...
Half-day reflective task before promotion cycle → written case mapping last 6 months at the shop to senior/lead competency rubric, with evidence reviewer can verify.

"Mid-engagement: two stakeholder groups disagree on scope. BA facilitates, captures positions, runs structured decision, records rationale for audit. Output: decision record + updated baseline + imp..."
"Non-designer stakeholders aligned on what's being built and why; decisions extracted, scope creep contained, follow-ups assigned."
Failed launch → clean shutdown plus a sharper next-bet plan in 30 days.
"Turn a missed launch into a clean shutdown plus a sharper next-bet plan: refund/migrate users, harvest learnings publicly, recycle assets, decide on rebuild vs pivot vs walk away."

"From perceived need (e.g. message queue, vector DB, feature flag service) to signed ADR + pilot result + rollout decision. Done = either a vendor/library picked with rollout plan, or a documented '..."

"Done = a new dependency (lib / service / SaaS) has a written evaluation note covering: fit vs build, license, security posture, supply-chain risk, exit cost, and a go/no-go recommendation; the dep..."
